extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可解锁挑战玩法<@qu.key>影拓丰碑</>
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock the challenging game mode: <@qu.key>Umbral Monument</>

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可解锁玩法<@qu.key>蚀像寻遗</>
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock the game mode: <@qu.key>Etchspace Salvage</>

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可解锁功能<@qu.key>生态种植</>
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock a new feature: <@qu.key>Eco-Farming</>

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可解锁功能<@qu.key>装备精锻</>
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock a new feature: <@qu.key>Gear artificing</>

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可升级<@qu.key>帝江号</>，解锁部分新舱室功能
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to upgrade <@qu.key>Dijiang</> and unlock new functional cabins

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可解锁功能<@qu.key>仓储节点</>，增加本地仓库库存上限
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock a new feature: <@qu.key>Depot nodes</>, which can raise local depot storage limits

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可开放仓储节点中<@qu.key>装箱运送</>玩法
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock: <@qu.key>Pack and Deliver</>, a depot node game mode

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可解锁功能<@qu.key>集成管家</>，开放集成核心区域升级
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock a new feature: <@qu.key>AIC Steward</>, which provides Core AIC Area upgrade options

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可解锁功能<@qu.key>物资调度</>，开放大量物资购买
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock a new feature: <@qu.key>Stock Redistribution</>, which allows purchases of various materials and supplies

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成后可开放<@qu.key>弹性需求物资买卖</>玩法，并解锁<@qu.key>其余区域</>的物资调度授权
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock the game mode: <@qu.key>Trading of Elastic Goods</>, and authorize stock redistribution in the <@qu.key>remaining areas</>

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可解锁<@qu.key>区域防护作战系列任务</>
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock: <@qu.key>Area Defense missions</>

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可解锁玩法<@qu.key>区域防护作战</>
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock the game mode: <@qu.key>Area Defense</>

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可升级<@qu.key>帝江号</>，解锁部分新舱室功能
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to upgrade <@qu.key>Dijiang</> and unlock new functional cabins

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可解锁<@qu.key>据点-重建指挥部</>
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock: <@qu.key>Outpost: Reconstruction Headquarters</>

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可解锁<@qu.key>据点-基建前站</>
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock: <@qu.key>Outpost: Infra-Station</>

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可提升<@qu.key>探索等级</>
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to increase <@qu.key>Exploration Level</>

extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to increase <@qu.key>Exploration Level</>

extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to increase <@qu.key>Exploration Level</>

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成此任务可解锁<@qu.key>工业爆炸物制作</>
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission to unlock: <@qu.key>Industrial Explosives production</>

extraInfoDesc.cn: 此任务可解锁区域<@qu.key>阿伯莉采石场</>
extraInfoDesc.en: This mission unlocks the area: <@qu.key>Aburrey Quarry</>

extraInfoDesc.cn: 完成系列任务可开放地图显示<@qu.key>景玉谷-迷踪林</>
extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission series to display the map area: <@qu.key>Jingyu Valley - Stragglers Grove</>

extraInfoDesc.en: Complete this mission series to display the map area: <@qu.key>Jingyu Valley - Stragglers Grove</>
